One of the best beaches in the world, safe swimming and beautiful soft sand.

Just a wonderful beach at Byron Bay, NSW. Parking available and the short walk to the beach is ideal...toilets and showers to rinse off! When the tide went out...top spot for a dip in the sand pools. With a good breeze....the kite surfers were out in force. Great views to mountains and then to the lighthouse. Beach Cafe and restaurant absolutely tops! ✔️🙌👌👍
Beautiful place. Must visit again
Used the toilets there, wow, what a relief

Great place for a swim or relaxation. Also full of sea life in the water surrounding it. Perfect spot for a day at the beach fir swimming, surfing or snorkeling. Follow my instagram @oscartrisleyphotography for more photos and videos
